[2018-06-20 18:26] leary93: Interesting challenge
[2018-06-20 18:27] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): I keep coming up with MTG style of names.  Prismata names are hard.
[2018-06-20 18:30] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): Challenge 16 unit

Solid Falcon (16 :Blue: :Blue: :Blue:, 4 supply) 6:Health: :Blocker: 
Start of turn: Gain :Attack: 
:Stamina: 1 Click: Pay :Blue: :Blue: to gain :Attack: :Attack: :Attack: and construct a prompt Energy Matrix
[2018-06-20 18:31] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Attini Crawler (6 :Gold: :Red: :Red: , 4 Supply) 2 :Health: 
:Frontline: 
When bought, construct 4 Nitrocybes.
:Click: and consume a Nitrocybe: gain :Attack: and construct a Nitrocybe
[2018-06-20 18:32] darkeisbein: that click seems pointless
[2018-06-20 18:32] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Why is that Falcon trible blue?
[2018-06-20 18:32] darkeisbein: like why not just make it a Start of turn: gain :Attack:
[2018-06-20 18:32] darkeisbein: I feel like in 90% of the cases this does the same thing
[2018-06-20 18:33] supergreyman (Greyman): You can't get :Attack: from consumed Nitrocybe since if it is clicked, it's already dead.
[2018-06-20 18:33] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Well shit, let me reword.
[2018-06-20 18:33] darkeisbein: actually we don't have precedent on that
[2018-06-20 18:33] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): screw it falcon is prompt
[2018-06-20 18:33] supergreyman (Greyman): It works for things like Steelsplitter because if it's clicked, the Steelsplitter itself isn't dead.
[2018-06-20 18:34] darkeisbein: I mean that's how you view it
[2018-06-20 18:34] darkeisbein: but we don't know if that's actually how it works
[2018-06-20 18:34] darkeisbein: or is intended to work
[2018-06-20 18:34] darkeisbein: or if there even is an intended way atm
[2018-06-20 18:35] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): crawler is interesting, assuming it works the way it should, it reuses nitros (slightly weaker than 1 attack but eh)
[2018-06-20 18:35] darkeisbein: it is probably to shocking
[2018-06-20 18:35] supergreyman (Greyman): Like for Odin/Steelsplitter, if you click Steelsplitter first and then click Odin, the result is the same as if you click Odin directly.
[2018-06-20 18:36] darkeisbein: 5 threat for 8cost and only 2 tech is pretty shocking
[2018-06-20 18:37] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): It's not 5 threat, only 4.
[2018-06-20 18:38] darkeisbein: click represents 1 attack and you get 4 cybes right?
[2018-06-20 18:38] darkeisbein: unless the click is just blow up a cybe to blow up a cybe
[2018-06-20 18:38] darkeisbein: cybes can already blow themselves up
[2018-06-20 18:39] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Blarg, how do I word it so the threat indicator is correct?  Click let's you get a new cybe when you pop one
[2018-06-20 18:39] darkeisbein: Start of turn: gain :Attack: 😛
[2018-06-20 18:39] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): it's just blow up a nitro to get that nitro back either next turn or in 2 turns (nitro is BT2)
[2018-06-20 18:41] supergreyman (Greyman): Could the Falcon be better than Centurion? 🤔
[2018-06-20 18:41] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): It's too obvious to kill it at 2 hp and start :Attack: , this version is always a bt2 attacker so the click is less obvious.
[2018-06-20 18:42] supergreyman (Greyman): Way less gold and tech heavy
[2018-06-20 18:43] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): prompt was a bad idea for falcon
[2018-06-20 18:44] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): to be fair, BBB is an awkward tech cost
[2018-06-20 18:45] supergreyman (Greyman): Yeah, the effect doesn't seem powerful enough to be BBB tier.
[2018-06-20 18:45] supergreyman (Greyman): It's a 6HP blocker though, so maybe.
[2018-06-20 18:46] supergreyman (Greyman): Now we have to compare this to Omega Splitter.
[2018-06-20 18:47] supergreyman (Greyman): If it's your main blocker, getting additional Falcon would be a bad idea.
[2018-06-20 18:47] supergreyman (Greyman): So yeah, supply 1 might be enough.
[2018-06-20 18:48] supergreyman (Greyman): But if you're using it as your main blocker, what is the Matrix doing there?
[2018-06-20 18:49] darkeisbein: so here is a silly idea that was inspired by my favorite non-mamalian animal, the octopus:

Octavian (18 :Gold: :Red: :Red: Supply 1)
:Fragile: 8
:Click: :Red::Red::Red::Red::Red::Red::Red::Red: : gain :Attack::Attack::Attack::Attack::Attack::Attack::Attack::Attack:
[2018-06-20 18:49] supergreyman (Greyman): Worse than Firespinner. Next.  :LongNoseLiar:
[2018-06-20 18:49] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): :OMEGALUL:  that click ability cost
[2018-06-20 18:50] darkeisbein: It's mostly cause I wanted to give it 8 health despites me knowing better
[2018-06-20 18:52] supergreyman (Greyman): This is.....really expensive. 😄
[2018-06-20 18:52] darkeisbein: I mean sure it's also a bargain
[2018-06-20 18:53] supergreyman (Greyman): Should cost 8 gold and 8 :Red:
[2018-06-20 18:53] supergreyman (Greyman): Now we need to make it 8 supply

[2018-06-20 19:10] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): I like it costing less than 8 red, so you can buy some of the animii on the same turn as it.
[2018-06-20 19:14] leary93: Can't octavian just also create 8 husks on it's click?
[2018-06-20 19:14] leary93: so that it might be maybe viable
[2018-06-20 19:24] darkeisbein: if it's just cheap enough it's viable
[2018-06-20 19:24] darkeisbein: simply by being really efficient
[2018-06-20 19:24] darkeisbein: but I don't know if it's a good design
[2018-06-20 19:24] leary93: 4 animus doesnt sound efficient >.<
[2018-06-20 19:24] leary93: maybe with savior XD
[2018-06-20 19:30] darkeisbein: Gaussite Hermit (5 :Gold: :Red: Supply 10)
:Fragile: 1
Start of turn: Gain :Attack:
:Click::Green::Green: :  Gaussite Hermits :Fragile:  becomes 5
[2018-06-20 19:33] kaelii: But. It can't block? So it's just a red unit that transitions into breachproof if you have a pile of green sitting around?
[2018-06-20 19:33] kaelii: And it is, you know, a fast unconditional tarsier for 5R, that turns into a goose cannon later?
[2018-06-20 19:34] darkeisbein: just an efficient attacker for red with the option to become bp
[2018-06-20 19:34] kaelii: I mean its a REALLY efficient attacker.
[2018-06-20 19:35] darkeisbein: yeah you are probably right
[2018-06-20 19:35] darkeisbein: still less efficient then shadowfang
[2018-06-20 19:36] darkeisbein: (but much easier to purchase)
[2018-06-20 19:36] kaelii: Yeah like waaaay less clunky to get out.
[2018-06-20 19:37] kaelii: I mean, even compared to hellhound I'm pretty sure it is pretty absurd.
[2018-06-20 19:37] kaelii: No engineer but you don't need one or two blastforges to spam them.
[2018-06-20 19:37] shadourow (Rando): Fast tarsier is a really good unit, and I don't think you should be able to play it outside of events
[2018-06-20 19:37] f300xen (f0x): fast tarsier is overpowered
[2018-06-20 19:37] shadourow (Rando): This unit is better than fast Tarsier 😐 (exept Ampo ofc)
[2018-06-20 19:41] darkeisbein: is it that amazing though? I always thought 6 :Gold: was kinda the baseline efficiency of a good attacker
[2018-06-20 19:41] miuna6933 (Aka): 1 red has some weird effects
[2018-06-20 19:41] shadourow (Rando): No, that's 6 golds + one colored ressource
[2018-06-20 19:41] miuna6933 (Aka): it's different from 1 green or blue
[2018-06-20 19:41] shadourow (Rando): Also, indeed, red cost less than green and blue
[2018-06-20 19:42] darkeisbein: 6 gold + one colored resource is a bad attacker
[2018-06-20 19:43] shadourow (Rando): Indeed, that's why powerfull attackers have (more or less) annoying tech cost
[2018-06-20 19:44] darkeisbein: I mean cheap powerful attackers exist
[2018-06-20 19:44] darkeisbein: like Botch, Kinetic, Fission
[2018-06-20 19:45] miuna6933 (Aka): note how all of those have lifespan
[2018-06-20 19:45] shadourow (Rando): Mmmh... right, I think that botch and fission are undercosted, lifespan isn't that annoying
[2018-06-20 19:46] shadourow (Rando): botch is just a super rhino without prompt (which can matters) and fission is pretty OP if you can get it's click and use those green
[2018-06-20 19:53] supergreyman (Greyman): Fun fact: During the testing phase, Smorcus was bought so frequently that Elyot has to reduce its supply from 10 to 4. And that's only a 5RR permanent attacker.
[2018-06-20 19:55] supergreyman (Greyman): So yeah, balancing low cost red unit is pretty hard.

[2018-06-20 20:29] kaelii: Gauss-Ant (7? :Gold: :Green: :Green: :Energy: , supply 20 ) :Fragile: 3
:Blocker: , :Stamina: 3
:Click: pay :Green: : Gain :Gold: :Red: :Attack: 

"We're not entirely sure who figured out how these crystal creatures metabolize Gaussite, but our engineering teams say they can be modified to produce alarming amounts of Replicase."
[2018-06-20 20:30] .jrkirby (jrkirby): Are orcas not mammals? I thought they were.
[2018-06-20 20:31] darkeisbein: where do you see an orca?
[2018-06-20 20:34] darkeisbein: Gauss-Ant seems weak: you are paying 9 for a click that produces :Attack: :Red: each turn if we are being generous and assumning :Green: => :Gold: is equal conversion
[2018-06-20 20:34] darkeisbein: and only has 3 stamina
[2018-06-20 20:35] .jrkirby (jrkirby): Tyranno Smorcus takes the Tyranno from T-Rex, which just means "King", Orca from the whale, and smorcus from twitch and puts them together. Thus it's a "King Orca that's very aggressive and attacks without abandon". If you look at the unit art, it's not really a dinosaur at all, it's just an aggressively mutated orca. That'd probably make it a mammal.
[2018-06-20 20:36] .jrkirby (jrkirby): Cynestra, on the other hand, is based off a scorpion, probably a much better example, yet it goes completely unrecognized. :FeelsBadMan:
[2018-06-20 20:40] supergreyman (Greyman): Compared to Flame Animus, it's still probably a little weak.
[2018-06-20 20:41] kaelii: Gauss-Ant is meant to be a kinda soaky green unit that lets you buy the generally more efficient red attackers off of your conduit. Buffing it to 4 HP might be fine although it probably shouldn't be 20 supply then. Maybe drop the gold cost and drop it to 2 health?
[2018-06-20 20:44] supergreyman (Greyman): It's like a cross between Flame Animus and Sentinel.
[2018-06-20 20:48] kaelii: 3GGE and 2 health? Or 7GGE and 5 health? Probably the low and high end cost ranges it maybe fits into?
[2018-06-20 20:49] camzace: 7gge and 5 health is way too much
[2018-06-20 20:50] kaelii: Probably -- see aegis and plexo although not prompt so also the very very edge of maybe.
[2018-06-20 20:51] kaelii: Definitely too much health on the supply side if it has 20 supply.
[2018-06-20 20:53] camzace: i guess its comparable with aegis

--- Thread (20 messages, 2018-06-21) ---
[2018-06-21 07:38] .jrkirby (jrkirby): I don't necessarily think this would be a better design, but what would you guys think about 3 frostbite and 6 cryo endotherm? Would that tend to be stronger or weaker?
[2018-06-21 07:39] redrame: I'd tend towards weaker, but it's hard to say.
[2018-06-21 07:42] mrguy888: I would tend towards stronger
[2018-06-21 07:43] mrguy888: Bites have some serious diminishing returns
[2018-06-21 07:43] kaelii: I guess it is 'only' one max freeze lower but has more overall freeze charges.
[2018-06-21 07:43] mrguy888: I like the part of endo where you get too many bites though so I think changing that aspect is the wrong way to go about it
[2018-06-21 07:45] redrame: endo is kind of only good when bites don't suck

[2018-06-21 20:36] .jrkirby (jrkirby): which means it doesn't have a meaning

[2018-06-21 20:37] .jrkirby (jrkirby): various tradeoffs would tell you 1, 2, or 3
